# Faneen — دليل الصناعات الخفيفة

## About
فنيين (Faneen) is the leading Arabic business directory for light industries
in Saudi Arabia and the Gulf region. We connect customers with verified workshops
and manufacturers specializing in aluminum, iron, glass, wood, kitchens, doors,
windows, and decorations.

## Coverage
- Aluminum works (أعمال الألمنيوم): windows, doors, facades, structures
- Iron works (أعمال الحديد): railings, gates, stairs, furniture
- Glass works (أعمال الزجاج): mirrors, partitions, storefronts
- Wood works (أعمال الخشب): kitchens, doors, furniture, flooring
- Kitchen manufacturing (تصنيع المطابخ): custom kitchens
- Decoration (ديكورات): interior, gypsum, painting

## Key URLs
- Homepage: https://faneen.com/
- Search: https://faneen.com/search
- Categories: https://faneen.com/categories
- Blog: https://faneen.com/blog
- Projects: https://faneen.com/projects

## Data
Business listings include: name (Arabic/English), description, services,
city, phone, images, rating, reviews.

## API
- Dynamic sitemap: https://faneen.com/sitemap.xml
- Edge function sitemap: https://hckpxwhjycmdflaneihd.supabase.co/functions/v1/sitemap

## Contact
Website: https://faneen.com
